data.title: Cielo extends unit offering, not for distribution in the US.
data.description: This press release is not intended for distribution to United States newswire services or for dissemination within the United States.

data.title: Enovix shareholders reminded of early warrant expiration condition met twice with 14 consecutive days above $10.50 price.
data.description: Enovix warrants have experienced a positive trend with 14 consecutive trading days where the value has remained above $10.50. This consistency signifies a strong performance and stability in the market. Investors have shown confidence in the warrants as they have consistently maintained a value above this threshold, indicating a promising outlook for Enovix in the market. This streak of value retention highlights the potential for growth and profitability, making these warrants an attractive option for investors seeking stable returns.

data.title: Tokenized stocks boost DeFi as NFTs grow popular. DeFi liquidity hits $270B while NFT DApps attract more users in July.
data.description: In July, Non-Fungible Token (NFT) Decentralized Applications (DApps) attracted a slightly higher number of active users compared to Decentralized Finance (DeFi) platforms. This milestone was reached despite DeFi recording an all-time high liquidity of $270 billion during the same period.
California to Conduct Redistricting Election in November: The Hill

data.title: Harvard's endowment invests $116M in BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF, marking a substantial venture into cryptocurrency.
data.description: Harvard University has made a notable investment in BlackRock's Bitcoin exchange-traded fund. This move, although not confirmed as their initial venture into cryptocurrency, signifies a substantial commitment by the university.

data.title: Cape Cod Healthcare APPs file for NLRB election to join MNA for stronger voice in patient care. 250 Nurse Practitioners, Physician Assistants, and Certified Nurse Midwives involved.
data.description: In Cape Cod, Massachusetts, on August 8, 2025, a significant number of Nurse Practitioners, Physician Assistants, and Certified Nurse Midwives at Cape Cod Healthcare have decided to unite and become part of the Massachusetts Nurses Association (MNA). This move aims to ensure they have an equal say in clinical decisions. The majority of Advanced Practice Providers (APPs) at CCHC have joined forces for this cause.

data.title: "Stash Smash" Tournament & Tasting Party on August 15, 2025 in Orland Hills, IL offers over $2,000 in prizes. Entry fee: $25.
data.description: Sponsored by Bloom, Kaviar, and Wyld, the inaugural "Stash Smash" event will take place in Orland Hills, Illinois on Friday, August 15, 2025 from 4:20 PM to 8:00 PM. Participants can join by paying a $25 entry fee, with a chance to win prizes exceeding $2,000. The event is set to bring together gamers and cannabis enthusiasts for a competitive gaming experience.

data.title: DermaRite recalls products due to Burkholderia cepacia contamination. Multiple lots affected. Risk of infection.
data.description: In North Bergen, New Jersey, on August 8, 2025, DermaRite Industries, LLC has initiated a voluntary recall of specific lots of their products due to microbial contamination by Burkholderia cepacia. The affected products may pose a risk of Burkholderia Cepacia Complex, which could lead to...

data.title: Vortex Companies promotes Ram Vela to Chief Strategy Officer for global growth, transformation.
data.description: Houston-based company The Vortex Companies, specializing in trenchless infrastructure renewal solutions, has recently promoted Ram Vela to the position of Chief Strategy Officer (CSO). This change, effective as of August 8, 2025, signifies Vela's increased responsibilities in guiding the strategic direction of the company. The Vortex Companies are known for their global presence and expertise in this field.
